title: The J2CL root shell now serves a selected-wave snapshot before live boot
summary: The explicit `/?view=j2cl-root&wave=...` route now renders a safe server-first selected-wave surface and preserves that DOM until the live J2CL selected-wave client takes over.

items: Added a targeted server snapshot path for `/?view=j2cl-root&wave=...` that reuses the existing Wave renderers instead of showing a blank selected-wave panel first
Updated the root-shell HTML contract so the selected-wave region exposes explicit server-first markers and private/no-store caching for per-viewer snapshot responses
Changed the root-shell J2CL boot path to preserve server-rendered selected-wave markup until the first live selected-wave content replaces it in place
